programme.title: Young IP Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Talented boxer Jia Yang is caught in an underground fight to clear her father's debts. She loses her Olympic aspiration and vanishes from the boxing world. 10 years later, Coach Li Yue is determined to help her honour her father's wish by returning to the ring. As passion and obligation collide, can Jia Yang revive her abandoned boxing dream?

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: To celebrate her wedding anniversary, Rachael prepares her famous beet risotto, made with roasted beets, red wine, onions, ricotta salata and more.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a soulful Southern twist on steak Diane, a pan-fried beef steak, by adding Cajun spices to the marinade and serving it with foie gras and Creole dirty rice.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Drawing on his travels, Jake puts his twist on boreka hand pies, filled with tender white beans, spinach and feta. This recipe can work as a side dish or is hearty enough to be the main course.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo takes us around the world to a restaurant with a bird's eye view of Singapore, as diners feast on fresh seafood fifty-seven storeys above the city.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: When web model Kara gets disturbing messages from a fan, influencer Cody comes to her aid. But when the stalker begins to show up in person, "IRL" takes on a whole new level of meaning for Kara.

programme.title: A Pickleball Christmas
programme.desc: After winning the biggest match of his career, professional tennis phenom Luke Hollis is ready to hang up his racket and take over family's tennis club.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5)
programme.desc: The team gets recruited for a big-money flip on a lake-front property. Although the potential profit is huge, the outdated layout and termite damage make this dusty time capsule a Mid-Century Mishap.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Tune is as host Michael Yo takes us to places set to satisfy the palate, while also challenging our ideas of a dining experience. Our first stop is a sushi-bar and game-show joint in New York City.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Join Michael Yo as he circles the world for meals that can't, won't and don't stop. Take a ride in a speedy elevator up a thousand feet to the highest revolving restaurant in Canada.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines the flavours of Morocco, Tunisia and Louisiana by making savoury cheddar cheese grits topped with "eggs in purgatory", a dish made with spicy tomato sauce, similar to shakshuka.

programme.title: A Pickleball Christmas
programme.desc: After winning the biggest match of his career, professional tennis phenom Luke Hollis is ready to hang up his racket and take over family's tennis club.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: Novelist Sarah becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: With rapid societal changes, diverse family structures are emerging beyond traditional norms. In this final episode, we’ll explore "customised family interiors" tailored to various family structures.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Join Michael Yo as he circles the world for meals that can't, won't and don't stop. Take a ride in a speedy elevator up a thousand feet to the highest revolving restaurant in Canada.

programme.title: Buddy Valastro's Cake Dynasty
programme.desc: When Las Vegas landmark Caesars Palace requests a cake from Buddy, it's all-hands-on-deck to create a giant cake replica of the casino, complete with statues and fireworks.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5)
programme.desc: Our trio of flippers are ready to tackle a 100-year-old Craftsman home in upscale Delaney Park. With only one bathroom sandwiched between two bedrooms, this tiny Zombie needs a lot of work.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece brings together Southern and Indian flavours with her black-eyed pea biryani. She sautés the peas with vegetables, spices and coconut milk, then bakes it with rice.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah creates a flavourful party menu featuring zupa ogórkowa, a Polish dill pickle chowder, and Kansas City-style barbecue salmon with biscuits. She smokes the salmon, then prepares a pickle soup.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a twist on the classic Polish dish galumpkis by using smoked ham hocks. The ham hocks and cabbage are cooked in a seasoned stock, while the stuffing is made from pork, rice and more.

programme.title: All Fixed Up In An Empty Village (S3)
programme.desc: With the construction in full swing, the celebrity directors make a surprise visit to the site. But when they arrive, they find only the skeleton of Shin Dong's team's empty house.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Julie and Julian spend most weekends escaping the hustle of city life by sailing, swimming and enjoying the coastal lifestyle. Now they have decided to turn their ocean escapes into their main job.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: Secret Love Triangle
programme.desc: After being falsely charged with murdering her best friend's husband, Jessica goes on the run with her husband. To prove her innocence, she must first untangle a deadly web of lust and deceit.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: When her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard from a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to light and more deaths occur.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: Ever taken medical advice from a cigarette commercial? There was a time when any and all 'cures' could be sold to the public indiscriminately.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5)
programme.desc: For decades, experts believed they knew what caused the Hindenburg disaster: that leaking hydrogen ignited. But there may be more to this story. What caused the Hindenburg disaster?

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: An exploration into the dark art of spycraft. From the frankenkitty to the umbrella gun, we'll reveal the deadliest spy weapons deployed to gather information and assassinate enemies.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: There's no horsing around when a statue made of turquoise moseys on in. Will it be a yay, or a neigh for Rick? Then, Chum spins over to LA to have a record collection appraised.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4)
programme.desc: Dr. Travis Taylor relives the most shocking and compelling phenomena that have taken place in the past year on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3)
programme.desc: History is full of people pushing the limits. Like the man who single-handedly liberated a town during World War II. Or an epic robbery in Buenos Aires that was pulled off with zero casualties.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: As the tumultuous first week nears its end, the remaining survivalists focus on regaining their footing. One participant discovers unconventional food sources to adapt to the harsh environment.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten locations that might be hiding alien bases. Are these locations proof that extraterrestrials are not only visiting our planet... but are hiding in plain sight?

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team thinks a 300-foot wreck off the tip of Florida just might be the Sudoffco—a steel freighter lost in 1926 with 29 men while travelling through the Triangle from New Jersey to the Panama Canal.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Marty withstands a brutal cold snap to harvest the last of his furs and fly home to his family; Mike carves a narrow road out of a steep ridge near his property to gain access to prime hunting grounds.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10)
programme.desc: In this final 'Beat the Judges' competition, two former Forged in Fire champions duel it out in a 5-hour round making a pichangatti to earn the right to go head-to-head with one of our formidable judges.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: Mother Nature levels the playing field this alligator season, unleashing a host of challenges that push hunters to new limits. Water levels have plummeted to unprecedented lows as the temperatures soar.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: When the team hits more wood deep in the Money Pit area where GPR results detected what could be a chamber, the Fellowship is more convinced than ever that their search for answers is about to pay off.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnon's team searches Scatarie Island for the Feversham's lost fortune. Battling brutal currents, they uncover artefacts that may lead to treasure.

programme.desc: A true story on a tomboy from rural Netherlands province who turned into the most featured person of Vogue – meet Doutzen Kroes from the top five of best-paid models

programme.title: Doutzen Kroes
programme.desc: A true story on a tomboy from rural Netherlands province who turned into the most featured person of Vogue – meet Doutzen Kroes from the top five of best-paid models

programme.title: Fashion Magazines
programme.desc: Explore the current array of the top fashion magazines, the vehicles of our luxury dreams and the source of inspiration. Check in for the latest updates, cutest outlooks and fashion insights

programme.title: Fashion Magazines
programme.desc: Explore the current array of the top fashion magazines, the vehicles of our luxury dreams and the source of inspiration. Check in for the latest updates, cutest outlooks and fashion insights

programme.title: Fashion Films
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy a handful of experimental narrative fashion films with top models starring, it’s one of the most artistic ways to follow the latest collections!

programme.title: Fashion Films
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy a handful of experimental narrative fashion films with top models starring, it’s one of the most artistic ways to follow the latest collections!

programme.title: Lingerie
programme.desc: Don’t miss the latest trends in the most sensual pieces of fashion, we’re talking about the latest lingerie collections presented on the world podiums! Sizzling hot looks from top lingerie designers

programme.title: Lingerie
programme.desc: Don’t miss the latest trends in the most sensual pieces of fashion, we’re talking about the latest lingerie collections presented on the world podiums! Sizzling hot looks from top lingerie designers

programme.title: The Trail of the Broken Blade
programme.desc: After avenging his father’s death by assassinating a high official, Li Yue disappears into hiding as a fugitive. His fiancée enlists a swordsman—who secretly loves her—to search for him, unaware that the bandit Xiao Mei has also fallen for Li Yue. Their intertwined love quadrangle explores themes of sacrifice, devotion and selfless love.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: The Goldfinger
programme.desc: Inspired by Hong Kong’s biggest financial scandal in the 1980s, this is a rags to riches story about Ching Yat Yin who is chairman of a listed company. With Ching’s wealth and influence on the rise, ICAC senior investigator Lau Kai Yuen is determined to investigate the case, even if it means spending 15 years in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: We are Family
programme.desc: Struggling as an extra, Chi Kwong joins a rent-a-family company run by Carlos and aspiring actress Catherine, and rent themselves out as make-believe relatives. As they surrogate different families, they unravel the complexities of family relationships, forging deeper connections along the way.

programme.title: Life Must Go On
programme.desc: When the “midnight gymnasium” programme for wayward teenage girls is at funding risk, social worker Yanki puts together a dodgeball team to compete in a match and save it. With an ex-star athlete John as the coach, the girls realize they must face their problems and overcome their challenges instead of dodging them. Can they finally win the match?

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: My First of May
programme.desc: Former squash champion Teng and his wife face devastating trials when their daughter is diagnosed with muscular dystrophy and his mother with cancer. Years later, as the family struggles between holding on and letting go, they find a new connection through a small but powerful sign of hope: the faint movement of their daughter’s pinky finger.

programme.title: The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Wang's odd behaviour and quirky ideas make him a social outcast. His teenage nephew Zhou, who is ashamed of his stutter, becomes Wang's only friend. Together, these misfits challenge traditional family expectations and social misunderstandings, supporting and inspiring each other as they seek their own paths in life.

programme.title: Legendary Weapons of China
programme.desc: Lei Kung, the leader of the Boxer Clan in Yunnan, dissolves the clan to save his disciples before going into self-exile. The Clan sends various assassins to kill him but failed. They then assigned Kung’s brother Yong to find and kill Kung, leading to a battle between the two brothers.

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: This iconoclastic film retells the legend of seven Chinese patriots, who sacrificed their lives to defend against 20,000 Japanese soldiers and 50 tanks for 5 days, at a strategic key point of the Great Wall known as Pa Tou Lou Tzu.

programme.title: The Kung-fu Instructor
programme.desc: Wong Yang is a famous martial artist who is forced to teach kung fu to the Mong Clan, an evil clan which is trying to destroy its nemesis, the Chow Clan. Chow Ping from the Chow Clan is a student of Wong’s caught in the Mong’s territory and as punishment, the Mong Clan wants to cut off Chow Ping’s limbs. Wong steps in to defend his student.

programme.title: Killer Constable
programme.desc: Kuei Chih-hung was famous for his modern day crime thrillers, his horror flicks, and even his comedies. But if the only kung-fu film he ever made was this one, he’d still be spoken of with respect by even the most ardent martial arts movie fan. Many consider this real life martial arts champion Chen Kuan-tai’s best performance. As a deeply, even obsessively, dedicated Chief Court Constable, he illuminates the screen with fighting skill and emotional passion. Award winning actor Ku Feng is his equal, playing an especially homicidal robber-chief who thinks nothing of throwing all his men at their relentless pursuer. Lu Tsun and Huang Pei-chi choreograph the many battles featuring such action stalwarts as Pai Piao and Ai Fei.

programme.title: Heaven Sword and Dragon Sabre 2
programme.desc: Only by bringing together the powerful Heaven Sword and the mighty Dragon Sabre can six martial arts sects struggling for supremacy be saved in this thrilling sequel to Chu Yuan's original hit.

programme.title: Pablik Enemi 1 N 2: Aksidental Heroes
programme.desc: Redford White and Dennis Padilla team in this fast paced wacky adventure as two bumbling idiots on the run after accidentally picking up a suitcase full of smuggled goods.

programme.title: Patron
programme.desc: Petras Guerrero (Dante Varona) is called "Patron" by the residents of Sacramento with good reason. He uses his police badge to kill vicious criminals, settle disputes and give money to the needy.

programme.title: Totoy Mola
programme.desc: He was already different even before he was born. As he grew up, he became the object of people's curiosity. Until he met the woman who would change his life forever.

programme.title: Laging Umaga
programme.desc: Teresa (Gina Pareño) is pregnant by her rich boyfriend Edwin (George Estregan). But Edwin is sent away to manage their provincial plant by his father (Don Lauro) to stop the impending unsuitable match. Father and son agree that if after two years and Edwin is still in love with Teresa, Don Lauro will no longer oppose the marriage.

programme.title: Bilang Na Ang Araw Mo
programme.desc: Martin and Rafael were childhood friends who grew up on different sides of the law. Martin became a hired killer, while Rafael turned into a respected defense lawyer.

programme.title: Laglag Barya Gang
programme.desc: Ike Lozada has been given the task to nurture and shelter homeless children. Unable to make ends meet, he taught his children to become street hustlers.

programme.title: Manchichiritchit
programme.desc: The reigning Queen of Comedy, Maricel Soriano, met rapper-comedian Andrew E in this delightful tale about con artists getting a heart of gold.

programme.title: Jack & Jill (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Everything in this tale seemed like a strange mix-up and you will find more in this utterly hilarious remake of a Mars Ravelo komiks classic.

programme.title: Proboys
programme.desc: This is the story of five young women, their adventures and misadventures in their search for Mr. Right.

programme.title: Bakit Manipis Ang Ulap?
programme.desc: When love takes everything you have, will you still fight for it? Chanda Romero and Laurice Guillen will take you to the bitter world of love, family, betrayal and deception.

programme.title: Alabok Sa Ulap (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Winston is smitten with Eva's beauty and decides to pursue her without knowing that Dom is secretly in love with her. But for how long will Dom be able to conceal the love that he is keeping deep inside of him?

programme.title: Noel Juico, 16 Batang Kriminal
programme.desc: Noel (Raymart Santiago) tries to stay out of trouble. But trouble seems to follow him anyway. Can Noel disentangle himself from the dangerous web he himself created?

programme.title: Sa Bawat Tunog Ng Kampana
programme.desc: Rodel (Philip Salvador) suspects his father did not die during a mine collapse as his employer Don Gonzalo (Vic Diaz) claims. If we consider that Rodel's father is a cook, the son's suspicions are justified.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: European Close
programme.desc: Analysing the major market moving stories across the day in Europe, hearing from the biggest newsmakers, and showcasing the unrivalled expertise of Bloomberg News.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Real Yield
programme.desc: A weekly show on fixed income with the biggest names in the field, covering sovereign and credit markets as investors grapple with fiscal, monetary and financial factors.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets
programme.desc: Bloomberg Markets is focused on bringing you the most important global business and breaking markets news and information as it happens.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick, Alix Steel and Scarlet Fu break down the day's top stories and trading action around the close.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: What'd You Miss?
programme.desc: Bloomberg TV's flagship markets programme, providing key insights, analysis and context at the market close. It's a highly intelligent look at the markets that misses nothing.

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programme.title: Frontrunners
programme.desc: In Hiroshima, as atomic bomb survivors age, preserving their memories has become a pressing issue. We follow Sumioka Kenta's efforts to further the cause of peace, through the creativity of youth.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: For the sake of their families, Nepalese men are working for the Russian military. Wages 10 times higher than in Nepal are promised, but as many go missing, their families await word on their fate.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Tsuji Masachika is working on using sounds that birds dislike to keep them away from airplanes and prevent bird strikes. He talks about seeking ways for wild animals and humans to coexist in harmony.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Episode 3 of this series on COP30 in Brazil looks at AMOC, an ocean current in the Atlantic. It transports warm water to the north, but melting ice threatens to stop it entirely.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: Doodles Or Ukiyoe
programme.desc: A series of doodles by the famous artist Utagawa Kuniyoshi turn out to be carefully considered depictions of the kabuki actors of the day. What kind of artistic statement was he trying to make?

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Pancreatic disease develops deep inside the body, making early detection difficult. We report on efforts to find it sooner using endoscopic ultrasound, and on doctors working on new treatments.

programme.title: The Imperial Palace
programme.desc: Completed in the 1960s and representing a fresh start for Japan, the new Imperial Palace showcases exceptional artistry and craftsmanship

programme.title: Giant
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher Bick Benedict (Hudson) and dirt-poor cowboy Jett Rink (Dean) both woo Leslie Lynnton (Taylor) a beautiful young woman from Maryland who is new to Texas. She marries Benedict, but she is shocked by the racial bigotry of the White Texans against the local people of Mexican descent. Rink discovers oil on a small plot of land, and while he uses his vast, new wealth to buy all the land surrounding the Benedict ranch, the Benedict's disagreement over prejudice fuels conflict the runs across generations.

programme.title: The West Wing S1 9
programme.desc: The President chooses his Supreme Court nominee.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect Special: Secret Stash
programme.desc: Michael shows lobster secretion is the future of hair care. And later, Michael proves he can make a woman believe anything, except that she's on a TV show.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect Special: Behind the Curtain
programme.desc: Using never-before-seen footage, Michael shares backstage secrets, the most epic freak out, and hilarious moments of recognition.

programme.title: Dirty Money S1 9
programme.desc: Hoping that old toys bring new joy and lots of money, the Direstas attempt to create a giant Lite Brite coffee table.

programme.title: Dirty Money S1 10
programme.desc: An auto junkyard inspires the guys to turn some rusted American classics into crisp American dollars.

programme.title: ER S1 25
programme.desc: Greene is sued for malpractice. Benton offers Carter a surgical internship, and Swift offers Greene an attending job for next year. Tag and Hathaway prepare for their wedding day.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S3 7
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown. the guys enlist shoppers to settle senseless debates in the mall, scream for ice-cream as patrons in a parlor, and protest unconventional causes in the park.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 13
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 14
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the "call of nature." Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 15
programme.desc: At an appliance store, a man goes bananas over Michael's self-stocking fridge. Then, Michael speeds up the life cycle of a frog in a science lab, and he pulls the strings at an estate sale when a haunted doll toys with his assistant.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 16
programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect Special: Cause & Effect Second Edition
programme.desc: Get a peek behind-the-scenes as Michael pushes magical boundaries with a fiery potato laser and a very unusual puppy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect Special: Exposed
programme.desc: In this special episode Michael presents the most talked about tricks from Season 1 and reveals all new behind-the scenes material.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect Special: CrittER Countdown
programme.desc: In this special episode, Michael ranks the series' most incredible moments involving animals, counting down to the very best in zoological trickery.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect Special: Top 5 Freakouts
programme.desc: In this special episode, Michael presents the show's top five funniest reactions, from the downright horrified to the hilariously mystified.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect Special: Behind the Curtain

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 14
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Amy convinces Sheldon to join her (as well as Howard and Bernadette) for a romantic weekend in Napa Valley to celebrate Valentine's Day.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 15
programme.desc: After they miss out on Comic-Con tickets, the guys mock Sheldon for trying to hold his own comic book convention...until he winds up spending a wild night with JAMES EARL JONES.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 16
programme.desc: Leonard's purchase of a dining room table for the apartment nearly causes Sheldon to break up with Amy, while Howard is offered a chance to return to space again.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 17
programme.desc: Professor Proton returns on "Star Wars Day" to offer guidance for Sheldon, while Leonard turns a relationship milestone into a competition with Penny.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 18
programme.desc: Howard invites Sheldon to travel to Houston with him in an attempt to improve their friendship, while Penny?s offered an embarrassing role and Raj asks Amy for help with a girl.

programme.title: Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: Acclaimed filmmaker Christopher Nolan writes, directs and produces this wartime epic action thriller. Dunkirk opens as hundreds of thousands of British and Allied troops find themselves surrounded by enemy forces in the Northern French City during 1940 World War II. Trapped on the beach with the sea at their backs, they face an impossible situation as the German troops close in. the story unfolds on land, sea and air. RAF Spitfires engage the enemy in the skies above the Channel, trying to protect the defenseless men below. Meanwhile, a quickly assembled British fleet led the legendary evacuation of over 300,000 Allied military forces in what Prime Minister Winston Churchill would call a "miracle of deliverance."

programme.title: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: In CLASH of the TITANS, the ultimate struggle for power pits men against kings and kings against gods. But the war between the gods themselves could destroy the world. Sam Worthington (Terminator Salvation, Avatar) stars as the Greek hero Perseus in this spectacular retelling of the classic myth (and '80s cult classic film). Born of a god, but raised as a man, Perseus is helpless to save his family from the clutches of Hades (Oscar nominee Ralph Fiennes -- Harry Potter films), the vengeful god of the underworld. With nothing left to lose, he volunteers to lead a dangerous mission to defeat Hades before he can seize power from Zeus (Oscar nominee Liam Neeson -- Batman Begins) and unleash hell on earth. With a daring band of warriors, Perseus sets off on a perilous journey deep into forbidden worlds. Battling unholy demons and fearsome beasts, he will triumph only if he can accept his power as a god, defy his fate and create his own destiny.

programme.title: Wrath of the Titans
programme.desc: Taking place 10 years after his heroic defeat of the Kraken, Perseus (Sam Worthington) embarks on a treacherous quest into the underworld to rescue his father, overthrow the Titans and save mankind.

programme.desc: A famous rapper and two teen fans are gunned down on his tour bus.

programme.desc: Officer Nolan and Celina take on a special case; meanwhile, Monica enlists help to identify her attackers. Elsewhere, Lopez and Harper discover a connection to the trail of crimes.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 6)
programme.desc: SWAT teams up with the FBI to hunt one of its most-wanted fugitives. Also, Hondo and Nichelle are faced with an unexpected development in her pregnancy.

programme.title: Coroner (Season 4)
programme.desc: Struggling with the loss of Liam, Jenny tries to take a vacation from death and happens across a mysterious dead body that stirs suspicion in a small town.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex (Season 5)
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex sniff out the suspects when the Chief Superintendent of the St. John's Police Department dies at a popular restaurant and all signs point to poison.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (Season 14)
programme.desc: Eddie and Badillo try to help a man whose apartment has been taken over by a squatter who also happens to be Jamie's confidential informant.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (Season 14)
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck for the Reagan family, as they race to stop deadly mayhem in the city when the gangs of New York unite together to demand amnesty for the release of their imprisoned members and those awaiting trial.

programme.title: Seal Team (Season 7)
programme.desc: After taking a stand against Command for better warfighter health, BRAVO is forced to the sidelines and eventually sent to Sweden on an underwhelming assignment.

programme.title: Seal Team (Season 7)
programme.desc: BRAVO finds themselves at the scene of a terrorist attack in Sweden and Jason survives a close call. Lieutenant Davis gives her new unit an ultimatum, and a family member surprises Drew and issues a mysterious warning.

programme.title: F9 The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: Tess gives the day off to a sleep-deprived Sunny before getting pulled into a nail-biting 911 call with an injured man locked in a steel drum who has no idea where… or who he is! As Tess navigates motives of revenge and business rivalry in a race against time to uncover the location of the soon-to-be murder victim and save his life, Sunny tricks Kye and obtains his security code, obsessively monitoring her neighbours on the building’s CCTV cameras, convinced she witnessed a murder. Tess and Sunny are reunited in an emotional climax, but are left to face the aftermath alone— Tess overwhelmed by information she shared about her past in an act of empathy, and Sunny confronted by Kye about her spiraling mental health.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: Elsbeth goes from the squad room to the locker room when a campus murder rocks the world of college basketball after an athletic director winds up dead following a heated confrontation with his basketball coach’s 22-year-old girlfriend.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: As secrets surface, Amy treats a critically ill patient, Jake hides Rachel's health scare, and Sonya and TJ probe Joan's absences.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 2)

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: In Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire, the Spengler family returns to where it all started - the iconic New York City firehouse - to team up with the original Ghostbusters, who’ve developed a top-secret research lab to take busting ghosts to the next level. But when the discovery of an ancient artifact unleashes an army of ghosts that casts a death chill upon the city, Ghostbusters new and old must join forces to protect their home and save the world from a second Ice Age.

programme.title: Red Snow
programme.desc: Olivia, an outstanding vampire romance novelist, longs to encounter a real vampire. Her wish comes true when Luke turns up at her remote snowbound cabin seeking for help. However, her dream transforms into a chilling nightmare on Christmas Eve when Luke's vampire companions track him down...

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) move into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: After a man is shot dead at his doorstep on the night he planned to propose, detectives follow a trail of obsession and jealousy that leads to a dangerous ex-lover.

programme.title: Murder And Mayhem in Taipei
programme.desc: It's the biggest manhunt in Taiwan's history when three criminals rapes and murders a famous pop star's daughter, Pai Hsiao Yen, and go on to commit other crimes.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When a mother of three is found lying unconscious beneath her open, second-story window, Medical Examiner Dr. Dragovic suspects there is more than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Cult Of the Black Jesus
programme.desc: Steven Tari, Papua New Guinea's most notorious cult leader, was charged with multiple accounts of underage rape and murder through his systemic use of 'flower girls' or cannibalistic virgin sacrifices.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: A series of random nighttime shootings has the city of Phoenix on edge as police try to end the reign of terror and interrogate two suspects.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After a successful businessman is brutally strangled, investigators become suspicious of his widow and her secret friend.

programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them. Stories of children who experienced the unthinkable: six girls hunted and murdered in their neighbourhoods; and more.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: After Chloe's birthday party is cancelled, Max and Phoebe compete to throw her a new one. When Max's time-stopping birthday gift falls into the wrong hands, he must work with Phoebe to stop some party poopers from ruining Chloe's birthday.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry gets an unexpected visitor claiming to be from the future. When a boy-robot killing machine steps onto the scene, The Gang must find a way to save everyone from an apocalyptic future.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: When a tax loophole allows Dr. Minyak to buy the Man's Nest, Captain Man must stand his ground and live with his terrible new roommate while Danger Force tries to find a way to reverse the sale before they lose the Man's Nest for good.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie says on the air that he is not a fan of internet sensation Fred, causing Fred to announce the end of his videos forever. Fans are infuriated that Freddie has caused an end to the popular videos.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Goomer's mom is coming to visit but has no idea that her son is an MMA fighter. Dice enlists the help of Sam and Cat to help convince Goomer's mom that Goomer is a high school teacher.

programme.desc: Desperate to save Wingnut from Tokka, Rahzar, & the Monster Mutanimals, Donnie delves deeper into the lab of a mad scientist. Meanwhile, his brothers follow another Tokka to the Staten Island lab... only for things to take a disastrous turn!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
